subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The letter written to Jináb-i-Manshádí was perused, and the events of that region were noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مرقوم بجناب منشادی ملحوظ گردید از حوادث آنصفحات مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @constitutional revolution in Iran, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @non-participation in politics
